creator: pyunyh@gmail.com
text:
On Mon, Mar 22, 2010 at 11:57:19AM +0100, Sebastian Tymk?w wrote:
> Hi,
> 
> Patch doesn't work.
> I created new ISO (FreeBSD 8.0)  with patched driver but it didn't work.
> 

Are you sure you patched both bce(4) and brgphy(4)? I have a couple
of success reports on stable/8. For example, read the following
thread and see Hugo's reply.
http://lists.freebsd.org/pipermail/freebsd-net/2010-March/024753.html

If it still does not work for you please show me the verbosed dmesg
output as well as the output of "pciconf lcbv".

> 
> Best regards,
> 
> Sebastian Tymk?w
> 
> 2010/3/18 <yongari@freebsd.org>
> 
> > Synopsis: [bce] bce driver on IBM HS22 [No PHY found on Child MII bus]
> >
> > State-Changed-From-To: open->patched
> > State-Changed-By: yongari
> > State-Changed-When: Thu Mar 18 21:55:10 UTC 2010
> > State-Changed-Why:
> > Patch committed to HEAD(r205299, r205300).
> >
